titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 55: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 55. (A.R. No. 243 of 1944.) VĀLIKAṆḌAPURAM, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālikaṇḍēśvara temple.
This record on the grounds of palaeography may be assigned to the tenth century. Possibly it belongs to the reign period of Rājakēsarivarmaṉ Sundarachōḷa.

It records that Maṟavaṉ Tuṅgāṉaiyān Pirāntaka-Vāḷanāḍuḍiyāṉ and his brotherin-law Vāṇarāyaṉ Araviñjaṉ Rājādittan had a contest (koḻiporutti) in which the latter was defeated and that he entrusted 7 pure gold (sempoṉ) to the body, Saṅkarapāḍinagarattār in Vālikaṇḍapuram for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruvālīśvarattu-Paramēśvarar for the merit of Pirāntaka-Vaḷanāḍuḍiyāṉ, with an uḻakku of ghee daily. Araviñjaṇ Irājādittaṉ seems to have presented a copper-lamp for the purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu maṟavaṉ tūṅkā
ṉaiyāṉ pirāntaka vaḷaṉāṭuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ maittuṉaṉ vāṇara
yaṉ Araviñcaṉ Irācātittaṉun taṅkaḷiṟ koḻiporutti Araviñ
caṉ Irācātittaṉ ṟoṟṟu pirānta vaḷaṉāṭuṭaiyāṉukkākat tiru
vāliśvarattu parameśvararkku vaiytta nontāviḷakku Oṉṟu
Ivviḷakkukku vālikaṇṭapurattuc caṅkarapāṭi nakarattār vacam ku
ṭutta cempoṉ Ippoṉ 7ø Ippoṉ koṇṭu nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai
cantirātittaval Aṭṭuvomāṉom caṅkarappāṭi nakarattom
ceppuviḷakku Oṉṟu Ivviḷakki(l)le Iravum pakalum Erikka panmāheśvarara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
